steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$4x + y = 22$$ and $$8x - y = 2$$. This gives $\frac{8}{4}=2$ but $\frac{-1}{1}=-1$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The $x$ and $y$ coefficient ratios differ, so the lines intersect once — exactly one solution. That matches Choice D — Exactly one.
